title: galium pumilum subsp. pusillum
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. pusillum, commonly known as small bedstraw, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of small bedstraw include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Small bedstraw can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
